# A11yScope

> Free website accessibility checker powered by axe-core. Scan any public URL for automated WCAG 2.1 AA issues, review WCAG 2.2 readiness guidance, and get fix-ready recommendations in seconds.

## About

A11yScope is a web accessibility scanning tool for developers, agencies, marketers, and site owners. It uses a real browser to render JavaScript-driven pages, runs axe-core accessibility checks, and returns a prioritized report with issue counts, affected elements, help links, and fix suggestions.

- Website: https://www.a11yscope.com
- Free scan: https://www.a11yscope.com
- FAQ: https://www.a11yscope.com/faq
- Blog: https://www.a11yscope.com/blog

## Current Capabilities

- Automated WCAG 2.1 AA and best-practice scanning with axe-core
- WCAG 2.2 readiness guidance for teams planning forward-compatible remediation
- JavaScript-rendered page support through a headless browser
- Accessibility score out of 100
- Violation details with affected elements and fix suggestions
- PDF report export
- One-time "email this report" delivery
- Scan history for signed-in users
- Full-site crawl for paid plans
- Weekly monitoring and email summaries for paid plans
- White-label PDF reports for Agency users

## Pricing and Limits

- Anonymous Free: 5 page scans per hour, no account or credit card required
- Signed-in Free: 50 page scans per month plus scan history
- Pro ($49/month): unlimited page scans, up to 3 monitored sites, weekly full-site crawl up to 20 pages per site, PDF reports, email alerts, 7-day free trial
- Agency ($149/month): everything in Pro, up to 10 monitored sites, larger crawl scope up to 50 pages, white-label PDF reports, 7-day free trial

## Use Cases

- Find common accessibility defects before a release
- Add accessibility checks to SEO and conversion review workflows
- Prepare remediation backlogs for WCAG 2.1 AA and WCAG 2.2 readiness
- Monitor marketing sites, ecommerce stores, SaaS apps, and agency client sites
- Produce stakeholder-friendly reports for product, legal, and client teams

## Use-Case Pages

- Ecommerce accessibility checker: https://www.a11yscope.com/use-cases/ecommerce-accessibility-checker
- Web agency accessibility audits: https://www.a11yscope.com/use-cases/web-agency-accessibility-audits
- SaaS accessibility monitoring: https://www.a11yscope.com/use-cases/saas-accessibility-monitoring

## Important Notes

Automated accessibility scans do not replace manual testing. A11yScope can detect many common issues such as low contrast, missing labels, missing alt text, empty links, empty buttons, heading structure issues, and landmark problems. Manual keyboard and screen reader testing is still required for a complete audit.

- European Accessibility Act Guide: https://www.a11yscope.com/blog/european-accessibility-act-2025-guide
